headline: Wheaties Celebrates WNBA Star A’ja Wilson’s Full-Court Impact with New Limited-Edition Box
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 16, 2026--Wheaties announced today that its newest champion to grace the cover of its iconic orange box will be 3x WNBA Champion and the league’s first-ever 4x Kia WNBA MVP, A’ja Wilson. From South Carolina standout to one of the most dominant players to ever step on the court, Wilson embodies what it means to be a Wheaties Champion — leading with excellence, making history and using her platform to inspire the next generation.
